title: Brankton
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Brankton |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']]{{JournalCite|8|A Certain Point of View (short story)}} |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|We've got a report of a fight between two passengers at the Galleria Shop.''"
"''Who's on it?''"
"''Brankton. And we've sent in a backup.|[[Raban]] and Detien Kaileel|}} '''Brankton''' was a [[Security officer/Legends|security officer]] onboard the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']], working under [[Chief of Security/Legends|Security Chief]] [[Detien Kaileel]]. While [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] [[Mantooine/Legends|Mantooine]], Brankton was assigned to deal with a fight between two passengers in the [[Galleria Shop]]. ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|8|A Certain Point of View (short story)|reprint=1}} {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Brankton }} [[Category:Guards]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Kuari Princess crewmembers]]
